Operation 'getUsageData' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Get Usage Data' is too generic and doesn't convey the specific domain context (API quota/billing). Description lacks clarity about authentication requirements, what constitutes 'rows', and the relationship to billing periods. Enhanced version specifies authentication method, clarifies that no parameters are needed, and explains the business context (quota tracking) to help AI agents understand when to use this operation for monitoring API consumption.

data.current_description: Returns usage statistics for the authenticated account, including rows used and rows remaining for the current billing period.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve account API usage and quota statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed usage statistics for the authenticated account, including the number of API rows consumed and remaining quota for the current billing period. Requires HTTP Basic authentication with your Moz Access ID and Secret Key. Returns usage metrics that help track API consumption against your account's billing limits. No request parameters are required.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get Usage Data' is too generic and doesn't convey the specific domain context (API quota/billing). Description lacks clarity about authentication requirements, what constitutes 'rows', and the relationship to billing periods. Enhanced version specifies authentication method, clarifies that no parameters are needed, and explains the business context (quota tracking) to help AI agents understand when to use this operation for monitoring API consumption.

message: Operation 'getLinks' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Original summary 'Get Links' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about how to specify link direction and doesn't explain the practical use case. Enhanced summary specifies the action and primary use case. Improved description clarifies the direction filtering capability, explains what metrics are included, and provides context for AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns a list of links (inbound, outbound, or both) for a specified target URL, subdomain, or root domain. Includes source and target metrics for each link.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve inbound and outbound links for target
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of links pointing to or from a specified target URL, subdomain, or root domain. Supports filtering by link direction (inbound, outbound, or both). Each link includes source and target metrics. Useful for analyzing link profiles and discovering linking opportunities.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get Links' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about how to specify link direction and doesn't explain the practical use case. Enhanced summary specifies the action and primary use case. Improved description clarifies the direction filtering capability, explains what metrics are included, and provides context for AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getTopPages' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity about how to specify the ranking metric and what fields are returned. Enhanced description clarifies that the ranking metric is selectable, specifies the output includes page URLs and metrics, and provides context for AI agent understanding of practical use cases.

data.current_description: Returns the top pages on a given subdomain or root domain, ranked by Page Authority or number of linking root domains.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the most authoritative pages on a specified subdomain or root domain, ranked by Page Authority or linking root domain count. Allows filtering by ranking metric. Returns page URLs with their authority metrics. Useful for identifying high-value pages for link building or content analysis.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity about how to specify the ranking metric and what fields are returned. Enhanced description clarifies that the ranking metric is selectable, specifies the output includes page URLs and metrics, and provides context for AI agent understanding of practical use cases.

message: Operation 'getGlobalTopPages' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description lacks specificity about input parameters and output fields. Enhanced description clarifies what filtering options are available, specifies the returned data structure (URLs and metrics), and provides better context for AI agent decision-making about when to use this global discovery operation versus domain-specific top pages.

data.current_description: Returns the top pages across the entire web index, ranked by Page Authority. Useful for discovering the most authoritative pages globally.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the most authoritative pages across the entire Moz web index, ranked by Page Authority. Supports optional filtering by category or limit parameters. Returns page URLs with their Page Authority scores and other authority metrics. Useful for competitive benchmarking and discovering high-authority content opportunities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks specificity about input parameters and output fields. Enhanced description clarifies what filtering options are available, specifies the returned data structure (URLs and metrics), and provides better context for AI agent decision-making about when to use this global discovery operation versus domain-specific top pages.

Enhanced description clarifies available filtering options, specifies the returned data (domain names and metrics), and provides practical context for AI agents to understand when to use this operation for domain-level authority discovery and competitive analysis.

data.current_description: Returns the top root domains across the entire web index, ranked by Domain Authority.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the most authoritative root domains across the entire Moz web index, ranked by Domain Authority. Supports optional filtering and limit parameters.
